daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but restless—like you're ready to shed something old. Trust that feeling. The universe is clearing space for what actually matters to you.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. If you're single, a genuine connection could spark from an unexpected conversation. If coupled, prioritize quality time over quantity.
daily.career: Your intuition about a project or decision is spot-on right now. Don't second-guess yourself. Small moves made today plant seeds for something bigger coming soon.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding—maybe that's a walk, stretching, or literally getting outside. Energy flows best when you're present in your physical space, not in your head.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about grounding yourself and releasing what no longer serves you. Mercury's energy is asking you to get real with your intentions. Trust that solid foundations are being laid for something meaningful.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, this is a week to have those conversations you've been putting off. Single? Someone's noticing your energy. Either way, authenticity is your love language right now—no performances needed.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that project or opportunity that's been sitting in your drafts. Your steady approach combined with fresh thinking is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slow, intentional movement. Think grounding practices rather than intensity. This is your sign to actually rest without the guilt. Nourish yourself like you mean it.
